name: Shepherd's Pie Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lbs Frozen Bread Dough,  see note
1 lb turkey light meat, skinless, cooked and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Using fingertips, spread dough to cover the bottom of a 14-inch pizza pan coated with cooking spray. Push dough up to the edge of the pan, forming a rim. If dough is too sticky, dust with flour. With a fork, prick the dough 15 times. Brush with oil.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. Bake crust for 7 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside.
3. In a skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add turkey, onions, and bell peppers. Cook until turkey is no longer pink and vegetables are tender. Add onion soup mix and frozen mixed vegetables. Mix well.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine mashed potatoes, sage, garlic powder, egg whites, and cheese. Mix well.
5. Spread meat mixture evenly over crust. Then spread potato mixture carefully over the top.
6. Bake for 45 minutes, or until potato topping begins to brown and crust is golden brown.
7. This will freeze.
Per serving: 351 Calories; 4g Fat (11% calories from fat); 21g Protein; 58g Carbohydrate; 51mg Cholesterol; 612mg Sodium
Serving Ideas: Cut and serve.
Notes: Let dough thaw at room temperature for about 1 1/2 hours.
